title: Andreas Herrmann
text: Home * People * Andreas Herrmann Andreas Herrmann and Eric van Reem , ICT 2002 [1] Andreas Herrmann , a German software developer and computer chess programmer. He is author of the chess engines ChessFiz , Holmes and BlackBishop , all written in Delphi [2] .
